name: thiago-bazillio-site
description: Landing page de consultoria online de treinamento feminino — Thiago Bazillio

scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test
scripts.release:patch: npm run validate && npm version patch && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm run validate && npm version minor && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm run validate && npm version major && git push --follow-tags
